messages.content:
Question: What are the top 5 businesses located in Los Angeles, California, ranked by highest average rating in descending order?

Available databases: review_database, googlelocal_db

Available schema:
Database: review_database (sqlite)
  Table: review — name, time, rating, text, gmap_id
Database: googlelocal_db (postgres)
  Table: business_description — name, gmap_id, description, num_of_reviews, hours, MISC, state

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query_type": "sql", "query": "SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE description ILIKE '%Los Angeles%' AND (description ILIKE '% CA %' OR description ILIKE '%California%' OR description ILIKE '% CA,%' OR description ILIKE '% CA%')", "database": "googlelocal_db"}

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"database": "review_database", "query": "SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id", "query_type": "sql"}

function.name: execute_python
function.arguments:
{"code": "import pandas as pd

df_la = pd.DataFrame(env['data_1'])
df_ratings = pd.DataFrame(env['data_2'])

df_merged = pd.merge(df_la, df_ratings, on='gmap_id')
df_sorted = df_merged.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False)

top_5 = df_sorted.head(5)['name'].tolist()
print(top_5)
"}
